name: Ceth
visualDescriptor: broad-shouldered woman in her mid-thirties, undyed apron, moves with end-of-day economy
persona: Runs her father's inn since his death two winters past. Reads people quickly and keeps her conclusions to herself. Does not ask about cargo. Has seen Grey-Faction marks on shipments passing through and has made her peace with not knowing.
canon: Inherited the waystation from her father who died two winters ago
Does not ask guests about their business
Has seen bisected-eye marked cargo pass through Helvrath's Cross
